title: cyanus pullatus
intro: Cyanus pullatus, also known as the Cornflower, is a small, annual or biennial plant in the daisy family. It has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the Cornflower include its ability to soothe eye irritations, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Cyanus pullatus include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat various health conditions.
